input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.2.4.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.2.4.5
            TITLE: the circular restricting cross section must not be movable or flexible in any way

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.2.4.5: The circular restricting cross section must NOT be movable or flexible in any way
IC.2.4.5 The circular restricting cross section must NOT be movable or flexible in any way

final_answer: The circular restricting cross section must NOT be movable or flexible in any way
